author: erwelch
text: Azure - Docs - document need to use C7N_TEST_RUN environment variable when recording cassettes.

author: yayitserica
text:
### ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

1. Documentation should clearly state that the `C7N_TEST_RUN` variable needs to be set locally while recording cassettes because other wise you'll record cassettes and the build will fail.

FYI [@erwelch](https://github.com/erwelch)
